zh.Eccles, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾埃克爾斯
zh.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓
zh.<Of Barton, Eccles, Lancashire, England>: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leigh於1440年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾埃克爾斯時，他的父親Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington30歲，母親Isabell Stanley29歲。他於1465年之前與Emma Grosvenor結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1500年享年60歲。

zh-hans.Eccles, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾埃克爾斯
zh-hans.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿德林頓
zh-hans.<Of Barton, Eccles, Lancashire, England>: 英国英格兰藍卡爾巴頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leigh于1440年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾埃克爾斯时，他的父亲Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington30岁，母亲Isabell Stanley29岁。他于1465年之前与Emma Grosvenor结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1500年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Leigh was born in 1440, in Eccles, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, was 30 and his mother, Isabell Stanley, was 29. He married Emma Grosvenor before 1465. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1500, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leigh est né en 1440, à Eccles, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabell Stanley, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Emma Grosvenor avant 1465. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1500, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leigh 1440 in Eccles, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington 30 und seine Mutter Isabell Stanley 29. Er hat vor 1465 Emma Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1500 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leigh è nato il nel 1440 nel Eccles, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Stanley, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Emma Grosvenor prima del 1465. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1500, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leighが1440年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレスで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonは30歳，母Isabell Stanleyは29歳であった。1465年以前にEmma Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1500年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Leigh(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c클스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Stanley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1465년 이전 Emma Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leigh nasceu em 1440, em Eccles, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Stanley, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Grosvenor antes 1465. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1500, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leigh родился в 1440 г. в местности экклесь, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Stanley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Grosvenor перед 1465 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1500 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leigh nació en 1440, en Eccles, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabell Stanley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Emma Grosvenor antes de 1465. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1500, a la edad de 60 años.
